programs.title: Kindred Spirits
programs.desc: Amy and Adam are the first paranormal investigators to enter Maplecroft, the mansion where Lizzie Borden died; they hope it is a groundbreaking opportunity to speak with the spirit of the alleged ax murderer.

programs.title: Kindred Spirits
programs.desc: A frightened homeowner's security system captures unexplained voices so terrifying that she must leave her house.

programs.title: True Terror With Robert Englund
programs.desc: A North Carolina storekeeper is tormented by a countdown to his demise; a New Orleans teen is trapped in a waking nightmare; an Atlanta police station is the battleground for a serial killer and a vengeful spirit.

programs.title: True Terror With Robert Englund
programs.desc: Inexplicable phone calls torment the manager of a New Jersey cemetery; a foolhardy citizen taunts an insane serial killer in New Orleans; and love and obsession drive a Florida scientist to desperate lengths.

programs.title: True Terror With Robert Englund
programs.desc: The horror escalates as a Massachusetts family hunts for a hidden fortune in a haunted house; a farmer battles a devilish curse in Ohio; a greedy mortician faces the wrath of the dead after he defiles their graves in a corrupt scheme.

programs.title: True Terror With Robert Englund
programs.desc: Two aging ranch hands battle a flying maneater in the Arizona desert; a young Theodore Roosevelt trespasses into the lair of a half-human predator; and demonic entities prey upon villagers in rural Pennsylvania.
